subject: Review request: draft LAW_N7-N11 pending amendment packet
body: Lane_03 has wrapped the NTS-added LAW_N7-N11 draft files into a pending amendment packet for cross-Lane review. These drafts are not active canon. Lane_01 is asked to review whether the draft files preserve Lane_01 intent and to identify required revisions before NTS decision.
requested_action: Review the pending amendment packet and respond with whether LAW_N7-N11 preserve Lane_01 intent, what revisions are required, what risks remain, and whether the amendment should proceed as one packet or be split.
acceptance_criteria: Lane_01 confirms whether LAW_N7-N11 preserve Lane_01 proposed intent.
Lane_01 lists required revisions before NTS decision.
Lane_01 identifies runtime, skill, capability, memory, and backend risks.
Lane_01 states whether the amendment should proceed as one packet or be split.
